description: This image displays two corporate logos side-by-side. On the left is the logo for "GeoVille", rendered in a dark teal colour, with the letter "V" uniquely styled in a brighter blue, appearing as a folded ribbon. Below "GeoVille", in a lighter grey, is the tagline "Information Systems and Data Processing GmbH". To the right of the GeoVille logo is the logo for "Indra", presented in a dark teal, sans-serif font.
